name: WF5 - MHD und niedrige Lagercharge ueberwachen

parameters.query:
SELECT sb.batch_key AS batch_id, p.product_key AS product_key, p.name AS product_name,
       'aktiv' AS status,
       COALESCE(to_char(sb.mhd_date,'YYYY-MM-DD'),'') AS mhd,
       sb.remaining_qty::text AS remaining_qty
FROM automatenlager.stock_batches sb
JOIN automatenlager.products p ON p.product_id = sb.product_id
WHERE sb.status IN ('aktiv','active','reserve')
ORDER BY p.name, sb.mhd_date ASC NULLS LAST

SELECT p.product_key AS product_key, p.name AS internal_product_name,
       COALESCE(na.alias,'') AS nayax_product_name,
       COALESCE(sa.mdb_code::text,'') AS mdb_code,
       m.machine_key AS machine_id,
       CASE WHEN sa.active THEN 'TRUE' ELSE 'FALSE' END AS active,
       sa.product_slot_key AS product_slot_id,
       COALESCE(pr.sale_price_gross::text,'') AS sale_price_eur,
       COALESCE(sa.current_machine_qty::text,'') AS current_machine_qty,
       COALESCE(sa.machine_capacity::text,'') AS machine_capacity,
       COALESCE(sa.target_stock::text,'') AS target_stock,
       p.category AS produktart,
       COALESCE(p.vat_rate_pct::text,'') AS mwst_satz,
       COALESCE(sa.notes,'') AS notes
FROM automatenlager.slot_assignments sa
JOIN automatenlager.products p ON p.product_id = sa.product_id
JOIN automatenlager.machines m ON m.machine_id = sa.machine_id
LEFT JOIN LATERAL (SELECT pa.alias FROM automatenlager.product_aliases pa WHERE pa.product_id=p.product_id AND pa.source='nayax' AND pa.is_primary=TRUE ORDER BY pa.alias LIMIT 1) na ON TRUE
LEFT JOIN LATERAL (SELECT pc.sale_price_gross FROM automatenlager.prices pc WHERE pc.slot_assignment_id=sa.slot_assignment_id AND pc.valid_to IS NULL ORDER BY pc.valid_from DESC LIMIT 1) pr ON TRUE
ORDER BY m.machine_key, sa.mdb_code, sa.active DESC

SELECT w.warning_key,
       w.warning_type AS type,
       w.severity,
       w.message,
       to_char(w.created_at AT TIME ZONE 'UTC','YYYY-MM-DDTHH24:MI:SS') || 'Z' AS created_at,
       CASE WHEN w.resolved THEN 'TRUE' ELSE 'FALSE' END AS resolved,
       COALESCE(to_char(w.resolved_at,'YYYY-MM-DDTHH24:MI:SS') || 'Z','') AS resolved_at,
       COALESCE(w.mdb_code::text,'') AS mdb_code,
       COALESCE(p.product_key,'') AS product_key,
       COALESCE(m.machine_key,'') AS machine_id
FROM automatenlager.warnings w
LEFT JOIN automatenlager.products p ON p.product_id = w.product_id
LEFT JOIN automatenlager.machines m ON m.machine_id = w.machine_id
ORDER BY w.created_at DESC
LIMIT 500

SELECT
  st.nayax_transaction_id AS transaction_id,
  to_char(st.settlement_at AT TIME ZONE 'Europe/Berlin','YYYY-MM-DD') AS sale_date,
  to_char(st.settlement_at,'YYYY-MM-DDTHH24:MI:SS') || 'Z' AS settlement_datetime_gmt,
  m.machine_key AS machine_id,
  COALESCE(p.product_key,'') AS product_key,
  st.mdb_code AS mdb_code_extracted,
  st.quantity,
  st.gross_amount AS umsatz_brutto,
  st.processing_status AS status,
  st.product_name_raw AS nayax_product_name,
  sa.product_slot_key AS product_slot_id
FROM automatenlager.sales_transactions st
JOIN automatenlager.machines m ON m.machine_id = st.machine_id
LEFT JOIN automatenlager.products p ON p.product_id = st.product_id
LEFT JOIN automatenlager.slot_assignments sa ON sa.slot_assignment_id = st.slot_assignment_id
WHERE st.settlement_at > NOW() - INTERVAL '90 days'
ORDER BY st.settlement_at ASC

UPDATE automatenlager.warnings
SET resolved = TRUE, resolved_at = NOW()
WHERE to_char(created_at AT TIME ZONE 'UTC','YYYY-MM-DDTHH24:MI:SS') || 'Z' = '{{ $json.created_at }}'

SELECT sb.batch_key AS batch_id, p.product_key AS product_key, p.name AS product_name,
       'aktiv' AS status,
       COALESCE(to_char(sb.mhd_date,'YYYY-MM-DD'),'') AS mhd,
       sb.remaining_qty::text AS remaining_qty
FROM automatenlager.stock_batches sb
JOIN automatenlager.products p ON p.product_id = sb.product_id
WHERE sb.status IN ('aktiv','active','reserve')
ORDER BY p.name, sb.mhd_date ASC NULLS LAST
